economic_notes: 25.5% interest in Pesakastew Solar Limited Partnership (10 MW solar farm in Saskatchewan); 8.3% interest in FHQ Casino Holdings Ltd. COVID-19 noted as significant event impacting operations.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Consolidated entity includes Star Blanket Cree Nation, CMHC Housing Program, White Buffalo Calf Gaming Authority, Star Blanket Rentals, Red Dog Holdings Ltd., and Red Dog Holdings Limited Partnership. Star Blanket Treaty Land Entitlement Trust is excluded as it is not controlled. Nation is under a Management Action Plan with ISC. COVID-19 disclosed as a significant event. Large deferred revenue balance ($5.96M) primarily from capital project funding (WTP upgrade, health clinic, sewage system). Net debt position of $3.13M. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC ($3,095,615) + FNIHB ($838,679) + CMHC ($172,464) + FHQ Tribal Council allocated as government ($302,772) + First Nations Trust ($221,268) - note FHQ Tribal Council and First Nations Trust may not be pure government transfers; ISC funding per Note 15 reconciliation.
